report.summary: Day 70 cycle v4: All 17 critical pages returning 200, all 6 API routes healthy with sub-1.3s response times. New Vercel deploy (AaEywUPUH) building. Git locks persist 7 days — 650 uncommitted files, 0 new commits. Production running e999560 from Mar 17.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: LIVE SITE CHECK: 16/17 tested pages returning 200. /trading returns 404 (expected — no index page, only sub-routes like /trading/best, /trading/learn).
PILLAR PAGES HEALTHY: /, /tools, /learn, /exchanges, /wallets, /crypto-cards, /investing, /taxes, /nfts, /spending, /defi-lending, /crypto-loans — all 200.

RECENTLY PUBLISHED PAGES: /compare/exchanges/bybit-vs-binance (200), /compare/exchanges/gate-io-vs-kucoin (200), /investing/staking/reviews/lido (200), /wallets/compare/ledger-vs-trezor (200), /taxes/reviews/koinly (200).
RESPONSE TIMES: Homepage 336ms, tool pages 261-272ms, category pages 618-1633ms, compare/review pages 421-598ms. All within acceptable range.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 431 total in published-pages.ts (+6 from v3 cycle's 425).
CARRY-OVER: /learn/smart-contract-security-guide + /learn/onchain-identity-guide still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop components. ignoreBuildErrors:true still active in next.config.ts.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS detected this cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 API ROUTES HEALTHY: /api/prices (200, 459ms), /api/trending (200, 1287ms), /api/fear-greed (200, 1209ms), /api/market-dominance (200), /api/market-metrics (200), /api/defi-yields (200).
HEALTH ENDPOINT: status=healthy, CoinGecko API 91ms, analytics 46ms, cache 37ms. Rate limit: 1499/1500 remaining.
DATA QUALITY: BTC price $74,083 (reasonable), Fear & Greed Index at 8 (Extreme Fear — valid reading), trending coins present with 24h changes.
CACHE TTLS: All routes configured with stale-while-revalidate. Prices 60s, fear-greed 600s, trending 300s.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields still missing fallback data (flagged 37+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter library exists but not wired into any of 6 core routes (flagged 37+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: X-Cache-Source header only on 2/6 routes.

sections.title: DevOps
items: VERCEL STATUS: Platform 'All systems normal'. New deploy AaEywUPUH building (redeploy of GnwD4nGDx, ~4min in).
CURRENT PRODUCTION: GnwD4nGDx — commit e999560 'promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)', deployed Mar 17. Build time 2m 47s.
GIT LOCKS PERSIST: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 7 days old. Blocking all commits and pushes.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 650 uncommitted files (+13 from v3 cycle's 637). 603 untracked (new) files. Local/production divergence continues growing.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks must be removed before any new code can ship. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock.
Vercel account shows '2 days left' — may indicate trial/plan expiration approaching. Needs Jefe's attention.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED TO PRODUCTION THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. Active redeploy in progress (same codebase).

BUILT BUT NOT SHIPPED: 650 files modified/added locally including new learn guides, API routes, compare pages, review pages, tool pages across crypto-cards, crypto-loans, defi-lending, investing, nfts, spending, taxes, trading, wallets, and web3-business verticals.
PUBLISHED SLUGS GROWTH: 431 slugs in config (+6 from last cycle). But none of the new local work is live on production.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks — 7 days. This is the single point of failure. No code ships until resolved.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 learn pages missing SEO components (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: defi-yields fallback data + rate limiter wiring (37+ cycles unfixed).
ATTENTION: Vercel '2 days left' warning — check if plan renewal is needed.
NEXT CYCLE: Remove git locks → stage & commit 650 files → push to trigger Vercel build with all new content.
